description: Finance domain Medium SOP rules. Inherits all 7 simple SOP rules (FS-01..FS-07) and adds 6 medium-only rules (FM-01..FM-06) for multi-step / conditional logic. Total 13 rules. Used by T5 (SCD). Slot/action references must resolve.

additional_rules.name: Autopay enable triggers payment-method cascade
additional_rules.description: enable_autopay must clear ALL three autopay_config slots in one transaction (autopay, autopay_bank, autopay_date) — this is a CASCADE case (serves C2).
additional_rules.constraint: After enable_autopay, the autopay_config group must read {autopay='enabled', autopay_bank=<non-null>, autopay_date in '1'-'28'}. If autopay_bank or autopay_date is left null, the CASCADE is incomplete and the rule is violated.

additional_rules.name: Fraud report triggers dispute-status initialization
additional_rules.description: report_fraud must initialize the fraud_info group: fraud_report_id set, fraud_amount set, dispute_status='open'. A missing dispute_status='open' after report_fraud is a CASCADE violation.
additional_rules.constraint: After report_fraud: dispute_status == 'open' and the full fraud_info group is coherent.

additional_rules.name: High-value fraud must escalate
additional_rules.description: If fraud_amount >= 1000, the agent must invoke escalate_to_human either before or after dispute_transaction. Skipping escalation on high-value fraud is a compliance violation.
additional_rules.constraint: fraud_amount >= 1000 implies escalate_to_human is in the action plan.

additional_rules.name: Loan requires identity + income disclosure
additional_rules.description: apply_for_loan must follow verify_identity in the same plan, and the income slot must have been set in the customer_profile group during this dialogue.
additional_rules.constraint: verify_identity precedes apply_for_loan AND income is non-null at submission time. Occupation is optional but recommended.

additional_rules.name: Temp limit is subordinate to permanent limit
additional_rules.description: set_temporary_limit must not set temp_limit < credit_limit (a temp limit cannot shrink the effective limit below the permanent floor).
additional_rules.constraint: temp_limit >= credit_limit. Otherwise the SOP is violated.

additional_rules.name: Credit-limit increase requires employment disclosure
additional_rules.description: request_credit_limit_increase requires both income and occupation to be set (full customer_profile group disclosed) AND two-factor authentication via verify_identity_tfa before submission.
additional_rules.constraint: income AND occupation are both non-null at submission time AND verify_identity_tfa has succeeded earlier in the dialogue. Missing occupation OR absent TFA is a SOP violation.
